title: chore(deps): update storybook monorepo to ^9.1.20
summary: Renovate Bot patch update of the Storybook monorepo: @storybook/addon-docs (^9.1.16 -> ^9.1.20), @storybook/react-vite (^9.1.16 -> ^9.1.20), and storybook (^9.1.10 -> ^9.1.20). Changes are limited to package.json specifiers and pnpm-lock.yaml. Upstream changes include request validation hardening, websocket connection hardening, and a .env parsing fix.
maintainerNotes: CI has failures in Lint, changeset check, Full Test Suite, and Observability Package Tests. The changeset failure is expected for automated dep bumps. The other failures should be investigated — they may be pre-existing/flaky on main rather than caused by this patch bump. Review approval is only from github-actions (automated), no human has reviewed. Since these are devDependencies (Storybook tooling only), risk is low, but CI should be green before merging.
